name: Spa Menorca Experimental
description: On a 19th-century estate a short walk from Cala Llucalari, the Menorca Experimental spa pairs treatment rooms, a sauna and a hammam with Biologique Recherche skincare and a yoga space. Open to visitors, not only to guests.

highlights: Three treatment rooms, a sauna and a steam room (hammam)
Facials and body treatments with Biologique Recherche; also Nüssa and Alex Carro
Yoga and pilates classes; a wellbeing space open to visitors (10am-8pm)
